revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''1-2-090

Unit of linear measure chiefly used at sea. It is approximately one minute of latitude.

The international nautical mile is 1852 m (or 6076 feet) (International agreement at the I.H.B. Conference of 1929).


Reference: I.H.B.

{{IALAFooter}}
